# Catalog

This skill bundles 24 specs. The website currently showcases 20 of them.

## Website Catalog

- `soft-blur-in` (per-character) Per-character fade-in with a gentle blur and upward motion. Apple's signature hero-title reveal.
- `per-character-rise` (per-character) Letters slide up from below with no blur — crisp, deliberate, kinetic. Apple's clean tvOS-style reveal.
- `per-word-crossfade` (per-word) Words gently fade into place one after another, with a short vertical drift for a calm keynote rhythm.
- `spring-scale-in` (per-word) Words pop in with a soft overshoot scale, like a physical spring settling into place.
- `mask-reveal-up` (per-line) Lines reveal upward with a soft masked feel and compact stagger.
- `line-by-line-slide` (per-line) Each line enters from the left with a staggered slide and exits to the right for a flowing paragraph reveal.
- `typewriter` (per-character) Per-character stepped reveal with a minimal editorial typing rhythm.
- `micro-scale-fade` (whole) A calm, tiny scale pop used as subtle premium polish for labels and headings.
- `shimmer-sweep` (whole) A subtle sweep across a clean headline, blending in while gliding from left to center.
- `fade-through` (whole) A Material-style content transition: old fades out, new fades in with a soft delay.
- `shared-axis-y` (per-word) Per-word hard-cut transition with staircase timing for sharp editorial swaps.
- `shared-axis-z` (whole) Scale-based shared-axis transition for focus shifts and context depth.
- `blur-out-up` (per-word) Words arrive clean and depart upward with increasing blur for airy exits.
- `scale-down-fade` (whole) Subtle premium settle-in with a restrained scale-down fade on exit.
- `focus-blur-resolve` (whole) A premium focus pull from heavy blur to crisp text, then a soft blur-out exit.
- `bottom-up-letters` (per-character) Letters rise from below in a pronounced staircase, one symbol at a time, with zero blur.
- `top-down-letters` (per-character) Letters descend from above in a pronounced staircase, one symbol at a time, with zero blur.
- `kinetic-center-build` (per-word) A word appears in the center; each new word enters from right to left with a soft blur and pushes the existing line until the full phrase locks centered. (renderer: `kinetic-center-build`)
- `short-slide-right` (per-word) The whole phrase glides in from the left as one compact move, while the words themselves are revealed in sequence only through opacity. (renderer: `shared-slide-opacity-stage`)
- `short-slide-down` (per-word) Each new word drops in from above into its own line and pushes the existing stack downward until a centered three-line composition locks in place. (renderer: `kinetic-top-build`)

## Additional Bundled Specs

- `depth-parallax-words` (per-word) Per-word depth motion with scale and vertical drift for layered readability. (website: hidden)
- `shared-axis-x` (whole) Horizontal shared-axis transition for sibling destinations with continuity. (website: hidden)
- `stagger-from-center` (per-character) Characters reveal from the center outward to emphasize the keyword core. (website: hidden)
- `stagger-from-edges` (per-character) Characters start from both edges and converge toward the center. (website: hidden)
